findings: agents/stampede-commander.agent.md lists banned models, but enforcement is prompt-only; violation handling is post-hoc (mark bundle partial) rather than pre-launch blocking.
tests/depth-guard-lint.sh enforces presence of "Premium Model Policy" and a premium model string (gpt-5.5) but does not assert banned-model strings or banned_child_models appear.
Commander has the task tool available; nothing prevents spawning children with a banned model or omitting model override (leading to default fallback) except instruction-following.
